name: getImageDescription
description: Analyze and describe an image through the internal API flow. Always execute a fresh analysis for each request and provide a public HTTP/HTTPS image URL. The optional 'prompt' focuses the analysis on specific aspects.
policyHint: When the user provides an image URL and asks what is in it, or when image analysis is needed to complete a task, use this tool immediately.

prompt.description: Optional instruction for what to focus on (style, objects, text, layout, etc.).
